landing.heroDesc: Secure, auditable multi-tier system request environment for ESS staff, regional branches, and system gatekeepers. Create and track system credential lifecycles with absolute transparency.
landing.featureSub: Built to support the demanding requirements of federal data management structures.
landing.faqSub: Understand the administrative flow, SLAs, and security architectures powering the ESS access portal.
landing.contactSub: Submit inquiries directly to the Federal IT Administration or locate regional branch contacts.
landing.addressVal: Ethiopian Statistics Service, Addis Ababa, Ethiopia
landing.contactSuccess: Thank you! Your message has been routed to our IT Administration Service Desk.
landing.contactPlaceholderMsg: Explain your issue or question in detail...

publicRequest.title: SUBMIT ACCESS REQUEST
publicRequest.desc: Fill out the security routing profile form below to launch an administrative workflow. Upon submission, a unique ESS tracking token will be generated.
publicRequest.systemSelect: Select the target system to access...
publicRequest.justificationPlaceholder: Detail why you need access to this system, what surveys/census datasets you will process, and expected access duration...
publicRequest.invalidEmail: Please provide a valid official email address.
publicRequest.minJustify: Justification must be at least 15 characters long.
publicRequest.successDesc: Your credential routing ticket has been registered in the Federal IAM system. Please store this token carefully to track live progress and retrieve active parameters.
publicRequest.vmsNotice: Notice: VMS Access requires Supervisor clearance.

publicTrack.title: TRACK YOUR ACCESS REQUEST
publicTrack.desc: Enter your unique ESS tracking token below to monitor administrative workflow stages, approval feedback, or to fetch your active credential parameters.
publicTrack.invalidToken: Please provide a valid ESS tracking token format.
publicTrack.noRequestFound: No access request registered under token
publicTrack.noRequestHint: Verify characters, check for spaces, or contact IT Administrator Desk for routing assistance.
publicTrack.awaitingComments: Awaiting administrative routing comments. Currently pending initial review.

login.title: SECURE OPERATOR LOGIN
login.mfaHint: MFA is required for all Administrative/Team Manager personas.
login.errorMsg: Invalid official credentials or unauthorized IAM profile block.
login.mfaReqNotice: Notice: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) is enabled for active operators.

dashboardPage.title: IDENTITY MANAGEMENT HUB
dashboardPage.sub: National Census & Statistics Information Security Control Console
dashboardPage.searchPlaceholder: Search requests by name, email, target subsystem or tracking token...
dashboardPage.noRequests: No security request tickets match current filter profiles.

userManagement.title: SECURE IDENTITY DIRECTORY
userManagement.subtitle: Active User Accounts, Identity Synced Profiles, and Security Clearance Clearances

userProfileModal.title: USER PROFILE & SECURITY SETTINGS
userProfileModal.mfaDesc: Secure your ESS account with real-time dynamic one-time passwords.

requestDetailsModal.title: ACCESS REQUEST COMPLIANCE FILE
requestDetailsModal.sub: Review, endorse, sign-off, or deliver secure database credentials.
requestDetailsModal.actionPlaceholder: Specify routing reasons, credential delivery variables, database parameters, IP restrictions, or push-back questions...
requestDetailsModal.paramNotice: These parameters are active and managed via ESS Directory Services. Handle with extreme care.

landingExtra.capabilitiesDesc: A comprehensive system of record engineered to unify directory isolation boundaries with flawless workflow automation and detailed compliance audit histories.
landingExtra.featSecureAuthDesc: Robust identity verification mapped to Ethiopian Statistics Service active user directories.
landingExtra.featRbacDesc: Define boundary controls for standard staff, immediate Team Supervisors, and IT Security gatekeepers.
landingExtra.featWorkflowDesc: Automated supervisor routing and system validations with real-time audit logs and comment history.
landingExtra.featTrackingDesc: Submit requests as a public guest and monitor live verification stages instantly using your request ID.
landingExtra.featNotificationsDesc: Direct notifications dispatched immediately upon ticket reviews, supervisor sign-offs, or delivery.
landingExtra.featAuditDesc: Non-repudiable logs documenting user vectors, approved systems, IP paths, and device parameters.
landingExtra.featDeptDesc: Requests are contextualized and routed based on specialized ESS research and survey branches.
landingExtra.featAnalyticsDesc: Aggregates visual charts on team routing velocities, approved system requests, and ticket queues.
landingExtra.featProfileDesc: IT controllers manage active system schemas, custom branding details, and system lists.
landingExtra.featSupportDesc: Submit secondary IT support tickets for credential issues or software troubleshooting.
landingExtra.flowDesc: Our automated system handles credentials validation, managerial routing, and IT gate assignments without a single manual email thread.
landingExtra.step1Desc: Standard corporate employee log in mapped securely to AD with robust credentials check and instant physical hardware MFA token validation.
landingExtra.step2Desc: Choose the target directory subsystem (AWS cluster, Database port, Billing API), define access type, and attach a valid corporate project justification.
landingExtra.step3Desc: The manager gets immediate notifications to approve or review justifications. Real-time comment threads minimize any administrative delay.
landingExtra.step4Desc: IT Administrator verifies managerial consent, completes system configuration, sends access coordinates, and locks down the SOC2 audit log.
landingExtra.benefitsDesc: Our modern corporate Access Portal balances operational speed with pristine risk auditing parameters.
landingExtra.benefit1Desc: Safeguard national statistical databases and security boundaries with robust, multi-layer authorization controls.
landingExtra.benefit2Desc: Autonomously compute manager approval chains and route alerts directly to responsible regional branch heads.
landingExtra.benefit3Desc: Public and contract staff can submit and track request flows without needing to register or authenticate.
landingExtra.benefit4Desc: Satisfy rigorous governance rules with comprehensive, chronological audit logs tracking all system approvals.
landingExtra.benefit5Desc: Configurable endpoints dispatch live updates directly via Telegram bots and standard SMS channels.
landingExtra.benefit6Desc: A single unified cockpit for IT Administrators to provision credentials, manage directories, and track load metrics.
landingExtra.testDesc: See how department managers and systems engineers authorize and audit administrative workflows on the ESS Access Portal.
landingExtra.test1Quote: The unified portal makes request routing between Household Statistics and ICT effortless. We slash delivery cycles from weeks to minutes.
landingExtra.test2Quote: Public tracking allows our census consultants to submit credential requests and check their status instantly from regional branch hubs.
landingExtra.test3Quote: An excellent enterprise-grade governance layout. The Telegram notification dispatcher keeps our security teams instantly informed of critical actions.
landingExtra.contactDesc: Do you need integration assistance mapping the access portal to a custom Active Directory instance, LDAP server, or custom AWS VPC container system? Contact us for specialized guidance.
landingExtra.contactSuccessDesc: Thank you. Your corporate security inquiry has been assigned to an Identity Architect. An analyst will contact you within 2 business hours.
landingExtra.footerDesc: Official centralized identity & access management gateway of the Ethiopian Statistics Service. Enabling secure role-based boundary validation.
